summary: M0 re-review resolves the prior excluded-manifest exposure and most resource-outcome gaps, but READY remains blocked by four findings: the carried security inventory still omits the CLI renderer's 16-MiB limit; new CI wording conflicts on advisory evidence-bundle terminal state; the new metadata design scans escaped canonical JSON without defining inspection of the raw decoded strings; and metadata-only findings cannot identify the offending tuple or field. No user clarification is required.
